name: Tamale Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and garlic in 1/4 cup olive oil until softened.
2. Remove from pan and set aside.
3. Add ground meat to the pan and brown, stirring occasionally, without breaking it up too much. Remove excess fat and liquid.
4. Return onions and garlic to the pan with the remaining ingredients. Mix well.
5. Transfer mixture to a casserole dish. Top with grated sharp cheddar cheese.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. The casserole may be frozen; let it come to room temperature before baking and bake slightly longer if needed.
